import.title: Imported from YAML
import.description: Your Chargeamps configuration has been imported from configuration.yaml. You can now remove the chargeamps section from your YAML file.

data.webhook_secret: Webhook secret (optional — leave blank to auto-derive from API key)
data.webhook_id: Webhook URL ID (optional — leave blank to auto-derive from email)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Chargeamps
reconfigure.description: Update your Chargeamps credentials or API settings.

data.webhook_secret: Webhook secret (optional — leave blank to reset to auto-derived)
data.webhook_id: Webhook URL ID (optional — leave blank to reset to auto-derived)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Chargeamps
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are no longer valid. Please update them below.

data.webhook_secret: Webhook secret (optional — leave blank to keep existing)
data.webhook_id: Webhook URL ID (optional — leave blank to keep existing)

error.invalid_webhook_id: Only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores are allowed
error.invalid_webhook_secret: Must be printable characters with no spaces

abort.wrong_account: The credentials belong to a different account. Use Reconfigure only to update settings for the same account.

data.chargepoints: Limit to specific charge points (leave empty for all)
